summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of BIG Hat Trivia Scoreboard. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend loads correctly with core features working. SharePoint integration works at API level but file picker UI has integration issue.

integration_issues.issue: File picker dropdown does not populate after SharePoint sync, despite API returning 6 files successfully

passed_tests: SharePoint files fetch API (6 files returned)
Get synced scores API (data retrieval working)
Presets CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Tournaments CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete, advance)
Frontend dashboard loading with all sections
Mode switching between Leaderboard and Tournament
Phoenix Suns inspired design theme rendering
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix SharePoint file picker UI integration - the API successfully returns 6 score files, but the dropdown doesn't populate in the frontend after sync/fetch operations. Check the frontend state management and ensure the API response properly updates the scoreFiles state in Dashboard.js.
